creatives.niche_raw: retro gaming enthusiasts, budget-conscious portable gamers, emulation fans who want to play classic console libraries
creatives.angle_raw: more games, better hardware, lower price — the value-spec retro handheld for serious emulation fans

mechanism: multiple screen sizes and form factors

notes: Anbernic homepage is primarily a product catalog with spec listings and pricing. No strong verbal outcome-claims — the bet is value/breadth (many models, many price points, broad emulation compatibility). No explicit maker/hackable framing. 0 active ads in ad library. Positioned squarely in retro-emulation territory, NOT maker/open-source territory.
